description_long: This is a three-story modern house with a flat, rectangular footprint and a dark gable roof. The facade features large windows and sliding glass doors, with balconies on the first and second floors adorned with potted plants and railings. The ground level includes a gated entryway with a short fence and a small front yard, while the side and rear elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and some greenery. The house is finished in a light, neutral color palette, primarily white and gray, with dark trim and accents. Street lamps and a paved base suggest an urban setting, and the overall design is clean and contemporary. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, with some wooden elements on the balconies.
description: A modern three-story house with a dark gable roof, large windows, balconies with plants, and a gated entryway, finished in white and gray tones. The design is clean and urban, with minimalistic side and rear facades.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main gated entry, balconies with plants, and large windows on each floor.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals a mostly solid wall with minimal windows and a small balcony, plus street lamps and a paved area.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a simple facade with a single balcony, a large arched window at ground level, and a staircase.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights another balcony, additional windows, and the continuation of the paved base with street lamps.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Gated entry with a short fence, main door recessed behind the gate, and small steps leading to the entrance
